name: Javier Montero
intro: Software engineer, mentor, and occasional tinkerer. I build thoughtful products on the web and help other people learn how to do the same.
about: I'm a software engineer based in New York. I've worked at companies like Google and New York Life working both frontend and backend positions.
These days I mentor 40+ engineers at a time through at Fullstack Academy, teaching frontend and backend fundamentals, running code reviews, and leading workshops.
I care about clean code, careful product thinking, and helping the next person up the ladder.
